original_image_tags: Official seal of the Federal Bureau of Investigation, United States Department of Justice.

elements.description: One official seal in the top left corner for the 'DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION', featuring a shield inside a circle with text around the border. The page also contains two punched holes at the top.

judge.reason: Both agree there is one official seal for the Department of Justice / FBI, but Description B adds details about its design and the presence of punched holes, which Description A omits, without contradicting each other.
